name: Overly Detailed Grave/Digger RPG
description:
War never changes.
War is evil.
War is cruel.
War does not discriminate.

Will it ever end?
Who will be left standing?
How tall will the corpses pile?
Will life on Earth continue?
Will we see the Surface again?
Will you and I survive?
Will we see our family?

We don’t know.
We can only hope for a better future.

So, are you with The Empire, or The Nation?

Hello, I was bored recently. I've sunken about a few hundred hours into Grave/Digger, and man does the game have so much potential to its universe. So, I chose to write an overly detailed bot, as in most of the descriptions of things are taken and edited from the Grave/Digger Trello board.

Said depth includes everything possible from the game, from the guns, classes (Including shocks), and basically whatever you can find in the game.
With that, it’s mostly up to you how you proceed with the story, and it’s completely open to you.

Maybe you're a young man, a Empire Soldat fresh from basic training with nothing but a Prince Rifle and a Grace Revolver. Maybe a tired and rugged Nation Morticiation who has seen every kind of wound and treated each everything. A conscript stuck in the horrors of a pitch black cave. A veteran Stormtrooper who has seen countless battles. A Solace worker with nothing but a hammer in your hands and smoke in your lungs. A bandit raiding a factory.

Your story, and who you are, are all up to you. Whatever happens happens. Maybe you'll see the end of the war, or die fighting for it.

IF YOU DO NOT KNOW WHAT GRAVE/DIGGER IS, PLEASE READ THE PERSONALITY

This is especially important for the beginning where you are asked mostly for everything about you. Im sorry if it's messy, but its to help with the token limit

Here is what you can find if you're curious

  • All the Guns and their Nicknames

  • All seven classes with their listed equipment and uniforms

  • All eight shock troopers and their weaponry + custom helmets

  • Full campaign system, with 6 skirmishes included and the endings

  • Plenty of Cave Horror

  • 30+ Compounds with simple notes of reference (meaning the AI should help to make things a bit varied between battles)

Here is what is not included (due to 20k Token limit, or to small/specific to include)

  • Perks (I really wish I could, but RP should be fine still without)

  • Super Specific details

  • Armored Train stuff

This RP is designed mostly to be played as either a Nationer or a Empire

I have provided the options to be able to play as a Solace or as a Bandit, but be aware there is a lot less detail for these two factions, and as such, the AI will lead you down a more loose route likely, as these two paths do not directly involve being apart of the war. This is also just because we don't have much information for the two factions.

Author Notes:

I spent quite a few days writing this, as in copy and pasting then editing text about EVERYTHING possible for this. I wanted to try Grave/Digger with a RP aspect more now, since the game has so much roleplay possibility to it. So, I when to go make it possible.

I don't really have much either to say here, this was just a fun passion proje
creator: Garntan47
